52330000007257288.name: Lead Owner Assignment
52330000007257288.description:
If the "Company" or "Existing_Company_Record" field is not empty:
→ Assigns the Lead Owner to user ID Lisl (represents leads linked to a company).

If those fields are empty, the function checks the value of "Course_For":

If "Course_For" is empty or 'Myself'
→ Assigns Owner to user ID Jeffrey

If "Course_For" is 'My Team'
→ Assigns Owner to user ID Lisl

52330000002460325.name: Update Deal and Invoice on Quote Closed Won
52330000002460325.description:
SQ LIJ Update the deal stage to Awaiting Purchase Order when a quote is won
Convert the quote to an invoice

AND
Update Deal with Number of Attendees from line 1 quantity (course)

And
Update Registration record 
Status = Spot Confirmed

And 
Update associated Contact
Status = Booked

AND
Create a TASK for the admin team to follow up on the invoice - 
Task created for admin one week out of course start date

AND 
Email to client (Account Contact)
Every day morning 8 am while Field in Deals "Purchase Order Number" is empty until Course Start Date

52330000002610986.name: Invoice Udpate
52330000002610986.description:
This function updates and enriches an Invoice record in Zoho CRM with relevant details:

Update Invoice CRM ID: Sets the Invoice_CRM_ID field to the Invoice ID.
Generate and Update Subject: Creates a descriptive subject for the invoice using the Quote_Ref_Number, Account_Name, or Contact_Name fields and updates it in the Invoice record.
Sync Course Info from Related Deal: If a related Deal exists, fetches the Course_Name and Course_Type from the Deal and updates them in the Invoice record.

52330000004251591.name: New - Update deal and Reg record
52330000004251591.description: This function updates the Invoice, associated Deal, and Registration Records in Zoho CRM. It ensures the Email_for_Invoice is set, updates the Deal stage to "Closed Won" if conditions are met, and synchronizes related records with the latest invoice details, including payment status and

52330000004975124.name: Inhouse - Calculate Overall Tax for Invoice
52330000004975124.description: SQ AP (12/12/2024) Inhouse version to avoid GST calculation if product doesn't have GST

52330000005069739.name: Update Due Date
52330000005069739.description:
Due Date Calculation: The due date is calculated based on the account's payment period:

End of Current Month: The due date is set to the last day of the current month.
After End of Month: The due date is set to the last day of the current month plus the payment term (in days).
In Days: The due date is calculated by adding the payment term directly to the invoice date.
Default: If no payment period is specified, the due date defaults to 7 days from the invoice date.

52330000005069778.name: When Po is received
52330000005069778.description:
Deal Stage Update: The Stage field of the Deal is updated to "Closed Won," and the workflow is triggered.
Purchase Order Number Update: The Purchase_Order_Number field is updated in the Deal, and the workflow is triggered again.
Registration Record Status Update: Each related Registration_Records is updated with the Status "Spot Booked," and workflows are triggered for each of those updates.
